summary: This is a very brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky expresses excitement about a preview of the upcoming 'Project Aardvark' movie (later released as 'Aardvark'd: 12 Weeks with Geeks'), a documentary about Fog Creek Software interns building Copilot. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a teaser for the film.
key_points: Joel previewed the Project Aardvark documentary and found it impressive
The post serves as a brief promotional teaser with no technical or analytical content
money_quotes: Now I'm really excited… I saw the preview of the upcoming Project Aardvark movie and it's simply amazing.
key_insight: A minimal announcement teasing the Project Aardvark documentary, offering no substantive insight beyond Joel's personal excitement.
